title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Today, I'm going to show you my exercise routine, so let's hit the gym for a full body workout.
So first, I'm going to do some cardio on the treadmill.
I'm a little bit better at dead lifts, so I'm going to add some plates.
I'm so sweaty now. I'm going to chug some water.
Next, I'm going to work out my chest, so I'm going to do a bench press.

title: will / shall
examples: First, I'll lay down on the bench.
I'll start by stretching my arms.

title: have to / must
examples: I always have to end my workout sessions with a gym selfie.

title: had better / it's time
examples: It's time to train our arms.
